que: What is the primary purpose of the SliverGrid widget in Flutter?
options: To display a single child with scrolling
To display a grid of children within a CustomScrollView
To display a vertical list of items

que: Which parent widget is SliverGrid typically used inside?
Which parameter of SliverGrid controls the children of the sliver?
Which parameter of SliverGrid controls the layout of the grid?
What does the childCount parameter in SliverChildBuilderDelegate specify in the example?
options: The number of children to build (10)

que: Which of the following is a recommended use case for SliverGrid?
options: Standalone grid outside any scroll view
Simple grid pages with no slivers
Advanced grids inside a CustomScrollView combined with other slivers

que: Which of the following is listed as something to avoid with SliverGrid?
options: Using for simple grids where GridView is enough

que: Where should you avoid using SliverGrid?
For simple grid use cases, which widget is recommended instead of SliverGrid?
Which parameter type is required for delegate in SliverGrid?
Which parameter type is required for gridDelegate in SliverGrid?
Which of these is a good scenario for using SliverGrid?
options: A simple 2x2 static grid on a non-scrollable page
A grid section within a complex scrollable screen with headers and lists

que: Which tip is useful when working with SliverGrid?
options: Use alone without any scroll view
Use inside CustomScrollView for advanced grids

que: Which statement best describes the role of gridDelegate in SliverGrid?
options: It controls the grid’s layout, such as number of columns and spacing
